name: Duran Dogan Basim ve Ambalaj Sanayi A.S.
summary: Duran Dogan Basim ve Ambalaj Sanayi A.S., together with its subsidiaries, provides packaging products in Turkey. It offers chocolate and confectionary, food, spirits, personal care and cosmetics, OTC, and nonfood packaging products; and rigid-setup boxes. The company also exports its products to the United Kingdom, Ireland, Belgium, France, the United States, and Russia. Duran Dogan Basim ve Ambalaj Sanayi A.S. was founded in 1953 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.
